headline: Raymond James Financial (RJF) Completes GreensLedge Acquisition
summary: Raymond James Financial, Inc. (NYSE:RJF) is one of the 10 Best Asset Management Stocks to Buy Right Now. On March 2, 2026, Raymond James Financial, Inc. (NYSE:RJF) announced the completion of the acquisition of GreensLedge Holdings LLC, a boutique investment bank. GreensLedge has a focus on structured credit and securitization. The acquisition, announced on October […]

headline: Lennar Earnings Miss Is a Bad Sign for Home Builder Stocks-Even if They’re Rising Today
summary: The company’s 16,863 deliveries, a measure of home closings, missed both guidance and consensus expectations, which called for 17,698.

headline: Raymond James Financial Stock: Is RJF Underperforming the Financial Sector?
summary: While Raymond James Financial has underperformed the broader financial sector lately, analysts continue to hold a moderately optimistic view of the stock.
